title: maytenus zeyheri
intro: Maytenus zeyheri, also known as the Black Olive Tree, is a medicinal plant species native to South Africa. It has been used traditionally for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of various compounds such as maytenin and maytansine. The medicinal properties of Maytenus zeyheri have been associated with several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, pain, and infections, as well as the reduction of inflammation and the promotion of wound healing. In traditional medicine, Maytenus zeyheri is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in pharmaceutical applications.
